name: vandeley
description: Art Vandeley's skill crate — importer of skills, exporter of well-architected components.

plugins.name: art-vandeley
plugins.description: Art Vandeley — importer of skills, exporter of well-architected components. One install: the agent, /hello-art, and his full skill crate (architect, judge, export, verify, commit, next-steps). Reads your environment, imports the skills that fit, ships components with papers, and answers in Mermaid + Markdown.
